# 🚀 Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **Metaverse Rang Microservice API**.

Please fill out this template to help reviewers understand your changes.

---

## 📌 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does.

- What problem does it solve?
- What feature or improvement is added?
- Why is this change needed?

---

## 🔗 Related Issue

Link related issue(s):

- Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER
- Related to #ISSUE_NUMBER

If no issue exists, describe context briefly.

---

## 🧩 Type of Change

Please check what type of change this PR introduces:

- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test updates
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / maintenance

---

## 🏗 Changes Summary

Describe your changes in detail:

- What modules/services were affected?
- What was added/removed/modified?
- Any architectural changes?

---

## 🧪 Testing

Please describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] API testing (Postman / Swagger)
- [ ] No testing required

### Test Environment:

- OS:
- Node version:
- Database:
- Browser (if applicable):

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots, logs, or API responses:

```
Paste here
```

---

## ⚠️ Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Yes (describe below)

If yes, explain:

- What breaks?
- Migration steps required?

---

## 🔐 Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets exposed
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] Auth / permissions checked
- [ ] No insecure dependencies added

---

## 📦 Checklist Before Submission

- [ ] Code follows project structure
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code is formatted and clean
- [ ] Tests pass successfully
- [ ] Lint passes without errors
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings

---

## 🧠 Architecture Notes (Important for Microservices)

- [ ] Changes respect service boundaries
- [ ] No tight coupling between services
- [ ] Communication handled via API Gateway / events
- [ ] Shared code only used via `/shared`

---

## 📡 API Changes (if applicable)

- [ ] No API changes
- [ ] API updated (Swagger/OpenAPI updated)
- [ ] Backward compatible

Describe API changes:

```
Endpoints added/modified:
- GET /example
- POST /example
```

---

Add any extra context, concerns, or technical decisions:

---

## 🙏 Reviewer Focus

Please pay special attention to:

- [ ] Performance impact
- [ ] Security implications
- [ ] Architecture consistency
- [ ] API design quality
- [ ] Code readability
